channel.title: Linux on Shubham Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Shubham Singh

item.title: Grafana Showed My Node Was Out of Memory. It Wasn't.
item.description: Two Grafana dashboards, same node, same timestamp - one shows 62 GB used, other shows 10 GB. Both are correct. Here's the full story of how Linux memory actually works and which number you should actually be watching.

item.title: Terminator Terminal: Every Shortcut and Feature You Need to Know
item.description: A complete cheat sheet for the Terminator terminal emulator covering all keyboard shortcuts, broadcast mode, layouts, plugins and launch options.
